overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city, passing under the 'Brookland' overpass, navigating through urban canyons and tunnels, before stopping at an intersection and transitioning to on-foot exploration. The scene features towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and dense cyberpunk architecture with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial approaching elevated overpass

events.description: vehicle passes underneath the 'Brookland' overpass sign with green traffic lights
entering covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: following a white car through moderate traffic on a multi-lane city street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large overhead gantry sign with 'Brookland' text marking the district entrance
massive concrete and steel elevated highway ramp with arch supports
tall vertical digital advertisement displaying 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' with neon graphics
skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising behind the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving toward the Brookland overpass in a futuristic city. The camera follows a white car under the large overhead sign, passing into the shadow of the elevated highway structure. Digital billboards and modern glass towers line the street while moderate traffic flows in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley beneath highway overpass

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn and scrapes against concrete wall, camera shakes
entering narrow urban canyon with graffiti-covered walls and dim lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating a tight turn and recovering from a wall collision in a narrow alley

entered.detail: gray concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags and street art
tight corridor formed by building facades and highway support columns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle makes a sharp right turn beneath the overpass, briefly scraping a concrete graffiti wall before recovering. The scene shifts to a narrow enclosed alley with dim mixed lighting, where the walls are covered in street art and the elevated highway looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with elevated highways and mega-skyscraper

events.description: emerging from shadow into dramatic sunlight streaming between skyscrapers
crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through the urban canyon following the white car toward the towering mega-skyscraper

notable_agents.action: white van passing in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

entered.detail: colossal futuristic skyscraper with geometric patterns dominating the skyline ahead
network of cables and structural supports spanning between elevated highways
tropical palm trees lining the right sidewalk adding greenery to the urban scene

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a dramatic sunlit urban canyon, with a massive mega-skyscraper towering ahead. Elevated highways frame the scene on both sides with suspension cables overhead, while palm trees line the street. The camera crosses a yellow crosswalk as other vehicles pass by.

events.description: entering dark underpass tunnel with artificial neon lighting replacing sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit tunnel following traffic ahead

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the underpass tunnel with red painted curbs
large white graffiti tags and street art painted on the left tunnel wall
linear neon light bars mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark underpass tunnel where artificial neon lights replace natural sunlight. The concrete walls feature prominent graffiti art, and the space feels enclosed and narrow. The camera follows the road toward the bright exit at the far end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection under elevated highway

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into brighter intersection with mixed neon and natural light
vehicle comes to complete stop at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light waiting for pedestrians to cross and traffic to clear

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner then crossing the street when light changes

entered.detail: distinctive modern building with sharp angular yellow facade and geometric design
wide pedestrian crosswalk with red and yellow painted stripes
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful neon graphics

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle enters a busy intersection beneath an elevated highway. The scene features a distinctive yellow angular building and digital billboards. The car stops at a red light as pedestrians gather and cross the street, creating a lively urban atmosphere with moderate foot traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crossing and sidewalk in commercial district

events.description: perspective shifts from vehicle driving to third-person walking as character exits car
character begins walking across the pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the street and continuing along the sidewalk through the commercial area

notable_agents.action: man in casual clothing walking ahead of the character across the crosswalk

entered.detail: steam or smoke rising from a vent on the right side of the street
ground floor commercial storefronts with awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person walking as the character exits the vehicle and crosses the busy intersection. Pedestrians walk alongside through the commercial district, passing the distinctive yellow building and street-level shops. Steam rises from vents on the right while the elevated highway curves overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a futuristic metropolis, transitioning from a high-speed drive through urban canyons and tunnels to a slow-paced pedestrian exploration of a commercial district. It begins with a white car gliding under the Brookland overpass amidst glass towers and digital billboards before making a sharp right turn that scrapes a graffiti-covered wall and leads into a dim, enclosed alley. The scene then opens into a dramatic, sunlit urban canyon dominated by a massive mega-skyscraper and palm trees, only to shift abruptly into the artificial neon glow of a narrow underpass tunnel. As the vehicle emerges from the darkness into a busy intersection marked by a distinctive yellow angular building, the camera seamlessly transitions from the car to a third-person walking perspective. The movement finally settles into a stroll through the lively street-level district, passing rising steam vents and pedestrians beneath the curving shadow of the elevated highway.
